name: Scheduled Tasks
description: Detects scheduled task creation, modification, deletion, and execution. Tasks are a common persistence and lateral movement mechanism. Event 4698 includes the full XML task definition — check TaskContent for suspicious actions, triggers, and principals.
author: EventHawk (SANS/Microsoft/Sigma)

event_descriptions.4698: Scheduled task created — TaskName, TaskContent (full XML with triggers, actions, principal)
event_descriptions.4702: Scheduled task updated — includes new XML definition
event_descriptions.106: Task Scheduler: Task registered — TaskName, UserContext
event_descriptions.107: Task Scheduler: Task triggered on scheduler
event_descriptions.108: Task Scheduler: Task triggered on event
event_descriptions.110: Task Scheduler: Task triggered by user
event_descriptions.129: Task Scheduler: Task created child process — ProcessName
event_descriptions.200: Task Scheduler: Task action launched — ActionName, InstanceId
event_descriptions.201: Task Scheduler: Task action completed — ActionName, ResultCode
event_descriptions.329: Task Scheduler: Task engine received message to stop task
